message.content:
@startuml
title 解析处理@EnableTransactionManagement注解

participant ConfigurationClassPostProcessor
participant ConfigurationClassParser
participant ComponentScanAnnotationParser
participant AdviceModeImportSelector
participant TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector
participant ConfigurationClass
participant ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader
participant AutoProxyRegistrar
participant AopConfigUtils

[-> ConfigurationClassPostProcessor : postProcessBeanDefinitionRegistry
ConfigurationClassPostProcessor -> ConfigurationClassParser : parse(AnnotationMetadata metadata, String beanName)
ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClassParser : processConfigurationClass(ConfigurationClass configClass)
ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClassParser : doProcessConfigurationClass(ConfigurationClass configClass, SourceClass sourceClass)

alt 当前被解析的Class有@ComponentScan标注，进行扫描
    note over ConfigurationClassParser : @ComponentScan扫描
    ConfigurationClassParser -> ComponentScanAnnotationParser : parseAnnotationAttributes componentScan, final String declaringClass)
    ComponentScanAnnotationParser -> ConfigurationClassParser : parse(String className, String beanName)
    ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClassParser : processConfigurationClass(ConfigurationClass configClass)遍历解析扫描到的类
end

alt 不进行扫描处理@EnableTransactionManagementimportbean配置类
    ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClassParser : processImports(configClass, sourceClass, getImports(sourceClass), true)
    note over ConfigurationClassParser : 获取到AutoProxyRegistrar、ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration
    ConfigurationClassParser -> AdviceModeImportSelector : selectImports(AnnotationMetadata)
    AdviceModeImportSelector -> TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector : selectImports(AdviceMode)
end

note over ConfigurationClassParser : 进行处理AutoProxyRegistrar、ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration
note over ConfigurationClassParser : 添加AutoProxyRegistrar、AspectJAutoProxyRegistrar到关联配置类\n（即标记@EnableTransactionManagement的类）\n的ImportBeanDefinitionRegistrars属性中
note over ConfigurationClassParser : 按照普通配置类处理ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration

ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClass : addImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar
ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClassParser : processConfigurationClass
ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClass

[<- ConfigurationClassParser : 解析完配置类

note over ConfigurationClassPostProcessor : 加载配置类的配置信息
ConfigurationClassPostProcessor -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader : loadBeanDefinitions

ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader : loadBeanDefinitionsForConfigurationClass
ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader : registerBeanDefinitionForImportedConfigurationClass
note over ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader : 如果是由配置类导入的，直接注册到beanfactory

note over ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader : 处理ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration，导入了切面BeanFactoryTransactionAttributeSourceAdvisor
note over ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader : 加载@Bean标记的注册方法
ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader : loadBeanDefinitionsForBeanMethod

note over ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader : 处理@ImportResource
ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader : loadBeanDefinitionsFromImportedResources

note over ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader : 处理AutoProxyRegistrar，注册了InfrastructureAdvisorAutoProxyCreator
note over ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader : 处理@Import，导入的ImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar类
ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> AutoProxyRegistrar : loadBeanDefinitionsFromRegistrars
AutoProxyRegistrar -> AutoProxyRegistrar : registerBeanDefinitions
note over AutoProxyRegistrar : 注册InfrastructureAdvisorAutoProxyCreator
AutoProxyRegistrar -> AopConfigUtils : registerAutoProxyCreatorIfNecessary

@enduml
